symptoms.symptom_name: Rapidly progressive depressed consciousness / not rousable for feeds in a neonate

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Depressed consciousness in a neonate is a cardinal sign of encephalopathy of any cause and mandates emergency escalation.
Leucine encephalopathy produces progressive obtundation as toxins accumulate.
Lethargy and poor feeding are classic non-specific signs of neonatal sepsis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Bicycling leg movements and rigid fencing posturing with alternating hyper-/hypotonia

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Alternating tone with stereotyped bicycling/fencing movements is a characteristic MSUD encephalopathy sign and may herald seizures.
Abnormal posturing signals severe cerebral irritation and rising intracranial pressure.

symptoms.symptom_name: Sweet maple-syrup / burnt-sugar odour of urine and cerumen

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: The maple-syrup odour (sotolone) in urine/cerumen is pathognomonic for MSUD.

symptoms.symptom_name: Fast, deep laboured breathing (Kussmaul respiration reported as heavy fast breathing)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Deep rapid breathing is respiratory compensation for a severe metabolic acidosis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Poor feeding, vomiting and failure to gain weight since birth on standard protein formula

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Feeding intolerance and failure to thrive after protein introduction are typical of an inborn error presenting in the first week.

symptoms.symptom_name: Decline strictly following protein feeding after a well birth

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A symptom-free interval at birth followed by decline on protein feeds is the classic temporal signature of MSUD and related disorders.
A well birth with normal Apgars and later onset argues against a perinatal hypoxic cause.

investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Uncorrected neonatal hypoglycaemia causes further brain injury; must be measured and corrected by paramedics/hospital.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Severe hypoglycaemia in an encephalopathic neonate is both a red flag and an immediately treatable cause of harm; sealed clinician measurement, not obtainable via chat.

symptoms.symptom_name: Full anterior fontanelle, poor perfusion, hypotension and tachycardia on examination

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A full fontanelle with shock physiology signals cerebral oedema and haemodynamic compromise — clinician-measured, sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Plasma branched-chain amino acids (leucine, alloisoleucine), venous gas, ammonia, lactate

investigation_details.investigation_name: Plasma amino acid quantification and metabolic screen
investigation_details.expected_result: Markedly elevated leucine with alloisoleucine; high-anion-gap metabolic acidosis
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Definitive MSUD diagnosis is missed; distinguishes MSUD from other inborn errors — hospital laboratory only.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Elevated leucine plus alloisoleucine is diagnostic of MSUD; never available in real time via telehealth.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Maple syrup urine disease in acute decompensation
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Encephalopathy + abnormal posturing + pathognomonic sweet odour + acidotic breathing + decline on protein feeds together define a life-threatening MSUD crisis.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Emergency 000 transfer and paramedic point-of-care blood glucose
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The only appropriate telehealth action — a critically unwell neonate needs paramedics now; they can measure and correct glucose safely en route.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Hospital metabolic screen — plasma amino acids, urine organic acids, venous gas, ammonia, lactate
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms MSUD and distinguishes it from other inborn errors and organic acidaemias; guides definitive treatment.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Full septic screen and empirical antibiotics
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Neonatal sepsis must be treated empirically in parallel — it can coexist with or precipitate metabolic crisis.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Instructing the family to attempt any home diagnostic test
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Families should not delay escalation to attempt home testing; the AI Doctor must not defer 000 to gather data.
